description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gcc Docker image and defines two stages: build-dbg and build. In the build-dbg stage add a build-dbg job that runs the shell command `make all -B DEBUG=yes` and stores the resulting binary bin/edil as an artifact named edil-dbg. In the build stage add a build job that runs `make all -B DEBUG=no` and publishes the same bin/edil file as an artifact named edil. No caches, services, or deployment targets are configured.
